sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Study exploring how safe people feel on the transport network and their experience of incidents impacting their personal safety.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Report examining perceptions of personal safety on public transport and the prevalence of incidents which undermine it. shows how safe people feel getting to, waiting for and travelling on the transport network

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: reports prevalence of experiences of anti-social behaviour, violence, verbal abuse, theft, sexual harassment and unwanted behaviours whilst travelling explores how perceptions and experiences vary by time of day, journey stage and transport mode, as well as for different groups of people in society

sourceReferences.citationText: dft-press-office – Research: Personal safety on transport
